description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the registry.gitlab.com/pages/hugo:latest Docker image and sets the GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY variable to recursive. Define two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that runs the command "hugo check" and is excluded from the master branch (except: master). In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs "hugo", publishes the generated public/ directory as a pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch.
